Description: Amazing review paper on the state of the art on Ultrasound-on-Chip systems for TX and RX.
Amazing technological basis baber describing the CMOS systems supporting butterfly IQ products.

Amazing peer reviewed journal paper reviewing the butterfly IQs product supported US diagnostic modes describing a encoded averager circuit for supporting the summation/averaging of up to 8 TIA LNA outputs with direct and reversed polarity for each individual channel in the same column to multiplex and further reduce input referred noise for each individual sensing line.
Review paper on the future use cases of AI in Point of Care Ultrasound (POCUS) diagnostics.
